metaDescription: Jireh Cooler provides AC repair, installation, and maintenance for homes and businesses in Fort Lauderdale, FL, part of our Broward County service area.
intro: Fort Lauderdale is the largest city in the Broward County area Jireh Cooler serves, with a mix of single-family homes, condos, and a dense concentration of commercial properties, offices, restaurants, and retail among them, all depending on reliable cooling to operate.

We work on both residential and commercial systems throughout Fort Lauderdale: rooftop and split systems for businesses, full-home systems for residential customers, and preventive maintenance plans for either, so small issues get caught before they turn into a breakdown.

faqs.question: Does Jireh Cooler work on commercial rooftop units in Fort Lauderdale?
faqs.answer: Yes. We service rooftop and multi-zone commercial systems as well as residential AC systems throughout Fort Lauderdale.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency AC service in Fort Lauderdale?
faqs.answer: Yes, our emergency line is staffed 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year for both residential and commercial customers.
